One. Example: 아아 하나 포장이요 = One iced Amer: Two. Example: 두 잔 주세요 = Two cups, please.
Three. Example: 하나 둘 셋 = One, two, three.
Four. Example: 네 번 = four times.
Five. Example: 다섯 개 = five things.
Numbers 1 to 5 for prices and phone numbers. Example: 오천 원 = 5,000 won.
Numbers 6 to 10 for prices and phone numbers. Example: 십 번 = number ten.
Counter for things. Example: 이거 두 개 주세요 = Two of these, please.
Counter for cups or glasses. Example: 커피 한 잔 = one cup of coffee.
Counter for people. Example: 두 명이요 = two people.
Korean money. Example: 오천 원이에요 = It is 5,000 won.
Counter for times or numbers. Example: 한 번 더 = one more time.
Use these before counters. Example: 한 잔, 두 개 = one cup, two things.
Ten thousand. Example: 삼만 원 = 30,000 won.
